protein_name: F-actin cross-linking protein which is thought to anchor actin to a variety of intracellular structures. This is a bundling protein. Belongs to the alpha-actinin family. Expressed in both skeletal and cardiac muscle. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
